top_signals.title: Polymarket eyes Japan market entry, appoints regional representative: Bloomberg
top_signals.summary: The prediction markets platform aims to secure regulatory authorization to operate in Japan by 2030, according to Bloomberg.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
